summary: The original extension todo file still contains the full detailed backlog. This status file records the current implementation state after the first backend implementation slice. The original file was not overwritten to avoid losing its detailed acceptance criteria.

tasks.title: Define WorkerSelectionPolicy schema for deterministic repair
implemented: WorkerKind, WorkerSelectionMode and FallbackPolicy enums added
fixed, automatic and policy_ranked modes supported
fixed mode requires fixed_worker_id or fixed_worker_kind
remaining: Embed WorkerSelectionPolicy directly into RepairProcedureExecutionPlan and ExecutionEnvelope models
Run test suite in target environment
Potentially expand schema with stronger risk_profile enum if project wants strict validation

tasks.title: Define WorkerRuntimeTarget schema
implemented: WorkerRuntimeKind, RuntimeDataBoundary, RuntimeHealthState and SecretAccessPolicy enums added

Runtime target fields include runtime_target_id, runtime_kind, location, endpoint_ref, workspace_scope, os_family, containerized, network_zone, allowed_capabilities, denied_capabilities, available_tools, max_parallel_tasks, resource_limits, data_boundary, secret_access_policy, health_state and validation_errors
secret-capable runtime requires explicit non-deny secret policy
WorkerRuntimeTargetService added with local_process_default and docker_default helpers
remaining: Reference runtime target from WorkerJobDB and repair execution records
Add persistent runtime target registry if desired
Run test suite in target environment

tasks.title: Implement WorkerRuntimeSelectionService
implemented: Fixed selection fails closed when worker unavailable or invalid
Rejected candidates include reason codes and missing capabilities
Native Ananta Worker preferred for repair.execute capabilities
Deterministic same-input selection covered by tests
remaining: Integrate context boundary policy from todo.context-access-policy-backend.json
Integrate live agent/runtime registry instead of test/fake candidates only
Add stronger fallback_policy semantics beyond deny/fail-closed defaults
Run test suite in target environment

tasks.title: Persist selected worker and runtime target in repair plan/job/result
implemented: SelectedWorkerRuntimeRef.from_decision() converts selected decisions into persistable metadata
remaining: Add fields or metadata mapping to WorkerJobDB
Add actual worker/runtime metadata to RepairExecutionResult

tasks.title: Add API for worker/runtime candidates and selection preview
Add Angular UI for fixed worker and runtime assignment
Add Angular UI for automatic worker/runtime policy configuration
Bind worker/runtime selection into BlueprintRoleDB.config
implemented: Legacy preferred_backend normalization exists in WorkerSelectionPolicyService
remaining: Wire service into team/blueprint routes and bundle import/export

tasks.title: Bind worker/runtime selection into Agent registration and validation
implemented: AgentInfoDB already has worker_roles, capabilities, execution_limits, registration_validated and validation_errors fields
remaining: Add runtime_targets to Agent registration model/API
Expose in UI without dropping advanced fields

tasks.title: Record worker/runtime selection in preview, trace, audit and operator view
implemented: WorkerRuntimeSelectionDecision includes decision_hash, selected reason and rejected candidates

tasks.title: Add E2E tests for fixed and automatic worker/runtime selection
implemented: Unit tests cover fixed native worker selection
Unit tests cover fixed unavailable worker denial
Unit tests cover automatic native-vs-opencode-vs-hermes selection
remaining: Add full repair flow E2E tests

safe_next_steps: Run pytest for the three new test files and fix any integration failures
Implement DRR-T049 persistence roundtrip without breaking existing DB migrations
Implement DRR-T050 read-only preview API using fake/in-memory candidates first
Then wire real AgentInfoDB candidates and runtime_targets into the API
Only after backend/API is stable, implement DRR-T051/DRR-T052 Angular UI
known_caveats: Tests were added but not executed in this chat environment.
The original detailed todo file still says todo for all tasks and should be merged/updated later when safe to rewrite the full JSON.
DB model migration/persistence is intentionally not fully implemented yet.
